apify.failure_reason: Actor.setValue not available in playwright-scraper pageFunction context — API mismatch. No structured output produced.

authentication_coverage.reason: No credentials available for cloud actor or local playwright without secrets folder access

findings.title: 8 voided memoized state shapes in Dashboard.tsx — dead code
findings.description: loopSteps, loopActiveStep, stats, issuePercentages, previousIssuePercentages, topIssue, newExposureCategories, suggestedActions are computed but void'd and never rendered. Dead code from a removed loop tracker.
findings.action_required: Remove all 8 void'd state computations in a cleanup pass.

findings.title: No direct return-to-cycle from Report Detail / Meeting Room
findings.description: When in the Governance Brief or Meeting Room view, returning to the cycle overview requires the sidebar or browser back. No explicit 'Return to Home' CTA surfaced in ReportDetail.
findings.action_required: Add a 'Back to Home' or 'Back to cycle overview' link at the top of ReportDetail.

findings.title: 'In Briefs' tab label is ambiguous on Issues page
findings.description: Tab means 'signals that appeared in a prior cycle.' Could be read as 'signals in the current brief' (all of them). 'Recurring' or 'Prior Cycle' would be unambiguous.
findings.action_required: Rename tab value label from 'In Briefs' to 'Recurring'.

findings.title: Baseline notice uses two different UI patterns
findings.description: First-cycle baseline notice appears as a navy card on Issues page (bg-[#0D1B2A]) and a different class (home-room-notice) on Home. Same functional message, different visual treatment.
findings.action_required: Align baseline notice style across both surfaces to share one design pattern.

findings.title: 'Accountability record' eyebrow competes with 'Follow-through record' page title
findings.description: ActionDetail uses 'Follow-through record' as the PageWrapper title and 'Accountability record' as the eyebrow inside the main card. Two names for the same concept on the same page.
findings.action_required: Change eyebrow to 'Follow-through record' to match the page title, or reverse the page title to 'Accountability record' for consistency.

acceptance_threshold_gaps: Cannot confirm visual polish without authenticated live screenshots
Dead code cleanup needed before external reviewer sees codebase
In Briefs tab label should be renamed
recommended_next_step: One narrow fix pass: remove voided state in Dashboard.tsx, rename 'In Briefs' tab to 'Recurring'. Then seed demo data and run a live 10-minute walkthrough of the authenticated loop to confirm visual sign-off.
